title: trifolium rotundatum
intro: Trifolium rotundatum, also known as the round-leaved clover, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its round, hairy leaves and small pink or white flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Trifolium rotundatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Trifolium rotundatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various forms of medicinal use.
